ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "week_start" TEXT /* Start date of the sales week */,
  "week_end" TEXT /* End date of the sales week */,
  "wm_week" INTEGER /* Week number for the sales data */,
  "store_nbr" INTEGER /* Store number where the sales occurred */,
  "brand_desc" TEXT /* Brand description of the item sold */,
  "vendor_stk_nbr" TEXT /* Vendor stock number of the item */,
  "item_nbr" INTEGER /* Item number of the item sold */,
  "item_flags" TEXT /* Item flags (e.g., promotion, discount, clearance) */,
  "upc" INTEGER /* UPC of the item */,
  "pos_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of items sold */,
  "pos_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "total_customer_item_return" INTEGER /* Total customer returns for the item */,
  "curr_str_on_hand_qty" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item on hand */,
  "curr_instock_pct" REAL /* Current in-stock percentage for the item */,
  "curr_str_on_order_qty" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item on order */,
  "curr_str_in_transit_qty" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in transit */,
  "sale_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID who made the purchase */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Employee ID who processed the sale */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax charged on the sale */,
  "net_sales" REAL /* Net sales amount after discounts and taxes */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for customer returns */,
  "return_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_nbr FOREIGN KEY ("store_nbr") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_purchases ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_brand_desc FOREIGN KEY ("brand_desc") REFERENCES brands ("brand_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_item_nbr FOREIGN KEY ("item_nbr") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_vendor_stk_nbr FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_stk_nbr") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the store */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., flagship, outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "brand_logo" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor */,
  "vendor_website" TEXT /* Website of the vendor */,
  "vendor_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the vendor */,
  "vendor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "upc" INTEGER /* UPC of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID of the item */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the item */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the item */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item (length, width, height) */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., electronic, clothing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Store ID where the inventory is located */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Item ID of the inventory */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item on hand */,
  "in_stock_pct" REAL /* Current in-stock percentage for the item */,
  "quantity_on_order" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item on order */,
  "quantity_in_transit" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in transit */,
  "last_update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Quantity threshold for reordering */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when threshold is met */,
  "shelf_location" TEXT /* Location of the item in the store (e.g., aisle, shelf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, sales analyst, inventory specialist) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., top-selling items, top brands) */,
  "analysis_value" TEXT /* Value of the analysis (e.g., item name, brand name) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Period of the analysis (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "analysis_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., algorithm, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID who made the purchase */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Item ID of the purchased item */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "purchase_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address if different from the store location */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Unique order number for the purchase */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
